morphology_stem: Cephalocereus polylophus is a species of cactus endemic to Mexico. Often grown under the synonym Neobuxbaumia polylopha, it is popular with cactus growers and reproduces well in cultivation.

name: Cephalocereus senilis (Haw.) Pfeiff.
description: По данным GBIF (коллекция UNAM). Морфология и синонимы будут добавлены.
morphology_stem: Cephalocereus senilis, the old man cactus, is a species of cactus native to Hidalgo and Veracruz in central Mexico. It is threatened in the wild, but widespread propagation and popularity in cultivation have reduced the demand on wild populations.
